governance_status: MISMATCH — selection has not yet converged (will on next cycle; champion now tracks survivability)
selection_rule: champion = highest-survivability strategy with >=5 trades, switched only on a >=15-point survivability margin (sticky, anti-flip-flop). Aggregate books excluded. No manual overrides.
